ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tickers" (
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry in which the company operates */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the ticker is traded */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector in which the company operates */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "average_volume" TEXT /* Average volume of the stock */,
  "annual_dividend" TEXT /* Annual dividend yield */,
  "payout_ratio" TEXT /* Payout ratio of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticker")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency code */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Full name of the currency */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country that uses the currency */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the currency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency")
)

CREATE TABLE "contract_types" (
  "call_put" TEXT /* Type of contract */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the contract type */,
  "strategy" TEXT /* Common strategies for the contract type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("call_put")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "contract_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the contract traded */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the trade */,
  "trade_price" TEXT /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the trade */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell, exercise) */,
  "order_type" TEXT /* Type of order (e.g., market, limit, stop) */,
  "time_in_force" TEXT /* Time in force for the trade (e.g., day, GTC, GTD) */,
  "execution_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade execution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of user account (e.g., retail, institutional) */,
  "account_balance" TEXT /* Current balance of the user's account */,
  "trading_experience" TEXT /* Level of trading experience (e.g., beginner, intermediate, advanced) */,
  "risk_tolerance" TEXT /* Risk tolerance of the user (e.g., conservative, moderate, aggressive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user holding the position */,
  "contract_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the contract in the position */,
  "entry_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the position was entered */,
  "entry_price" TEXT /* Price at which the position was entered */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the position */,
  "current_price" TEXT /* Current price of the contract */,
  "pnl" TEXT /* Profit and loss of the position */,
  "stop_loss" TEXT /* Stop-loss price for the position */,
  "take_profit" TEXT /* Take-profit price for the position */,
  "position_status" TEXT /* Status of the position (e.g., open, closed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_positions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the alert */,
  "contract_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the contract for which the alert is set */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price, volatility) */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition that triggers the alert */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was created */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, inactive, triggered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "widgets" TEXT /* List of widgets included in the dashboard */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the dashboard was created */,
  "layout" TEXT /* Layout of the dashboard (e.g., grid, table, chart) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security" (
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security measure */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the security measure applies */,
  "two_factor_auth" INTEGER /* Indicator if two-factor authentication is enabled */,
  "password_strength" TEXT /* Strength of the user's password */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "account_lockout" INTEGER /* Indicator if the account is locked out */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("security_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaboration" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration session */,
  "initiator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the collaboration */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is participating in the collaboration */,
  "topic" TEXT /* Topic of the collaboration */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the collaboration */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the collaboration */,
  "collaboration_status" TEXT /* Status of the collaboration (e.g., active, inactive, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaboration_initiator_id FOREIGN KEY ("initiator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaboration_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
